minimum_required_app_version.description: Force update when the installed app version is lower than this value, for example 1.0.1.

minimum_required_build_number.description: Force update when the installed build number is lower than this value.

recommended_app_version.description: Show optional update when the installed app version is lower than this value.

recommended_build_number.description: Show optional update when the installed build number is lower than this value.

app_tester_url.description: External URL opened by the App Tester button on the update screen.
